overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dense coniferous forest at night, transitioning to a coastal cliff overlooking a foggy sea with distant islands and windmill structures visible on the horizon.

events.description: character briefly transitions from walking to jogging then back to walking

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow forest path surrounded by tall pine trees and dense undergrowth

entered.detail: Dense forest of tall evergreen pine trees surrounding the path on all sides
Narrow winding path covered in grass and dirt through the forest
Dense shrubs and low vegetation lining the sides of the path
Snow-capped mountain visible occasionally through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense pine forest at night, with tall evergreen trees enclosing a narrow grassy path. Geralt walks forward through the undergrowth, briefly jogging at one point, with a distant mountain peak occasionally visible through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge transitioning to coastal hillside

events.description: forest opens up revealing large body of water and distant foggy islands on the horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the widening path as the forest thins and coastal views emerge ahead

entered.detail: Large expanse of dark water becoming visible through the thinning trees
Foggy rocky outcroppings and islands visible across the water
Rocky formations along the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, the dense forest canopy gives way to a more open hillside. The trees thin out to the left while the right side opens up to reveal a large body of water with foggy islands in the distance, marking the transition from forest interior to coastal edge.

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the curving coastline

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the grassy coast with expansive water views, distant windmills and rocky islets visible on the horizon

entered.detail: Windmill structures visible on the distant foggy shoreline
Rocky edge of the cliff dropping down to the water
Low shrubs and bushes dotting the coastal grassland

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide coastal cliff with the forest now behind. Geralt walks along the grassy edge overlooking the calm water, with distant windmills and rocky islets visible through the fog. The camera follows as he turns slightly to trace the curve of the coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a nocturnal pine forest to the expansive vista of a foggy coastal cliff. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow grassy path enclosed by tall evergreen trees, with only a distant mountain peak occasionally piercing the dense canopy. As he progresses, the forest canopy gradually thins and the trees recede to the left, opening the landscape to reveal a vast body of water and misty islands. The scene then expands fully onto a wide coastal cliff, leaving the forest behind as Geralt walks along the grassy edge overlooking calm waters. Finally, the camera follows him as he turns to trace the curve of the coastline, where distant windmills and rocky islets emerge through the fog.
